chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT ' SUKKUR L.P N%.D-1136 0f2023 Date Order with signature of Judge For ordan on ofiflcs oblactlon, 0/ CMA N0.4751/2023 For haaring ol maln cafg 0&2&2023 Mr Salman Zaheer Khan Advocates for the Petitioner Mr Ali Raza Balouch AAG along with Imtiaz MohsineAc Ghotki ٦144+4 Petitioner is a public limited listed company engaged alia, in production manufacture an٥ sale of refined sUge٢ aggrieved by Notice of Demand dated 18.07.2023 issued by Assistant Commissioner / Assistant Collector of First Grade Taluka Ghotki directing the petitioner to pay the sum of Rs.7,22,51,124/- (Rupees Seven Crore Two Lac Fifty One Thousand One Hundred Twenty Four) under Rule 19 of Sindh Tax Rules 2OOT due against it Learned Counsel f٥٢ ٤٨٤ Petitioner has submitted petitioner has already filed an appeal with the Deputy Commissioner Ghotki against the order along with stay application but neither stay application ٨٥٢ appeal has been decided and meanwhile petitioner is apprehending some adverse action in pursuance of the impugned notice According to him in case the adverse action is taken against it the very filing of appeal and stay application would become infructuous and the petitioner would be rendered remedy which is; against the natural principles of law He further submits that petitioner is ready to contest c354 merits before the Commissioner but some arrangement may be made so that the appeal may not become infructuous Learned AAG has filed preliminary objections behalf of Respondents No2 & 3 along with annexures annexed with authority letter, which are taken on recordi copy whereof has been huaring inter- Twenty that |ess, Deputy supplied حداما 3 اا -ھ Counsel for the Petitioner He has however controverted of learned Counsel for the petitioner After hearing the parties and perusing the material available this petition is disposed of with consent in the terms months no adverse action would be taken against whereby for in terms of impugned notice In the said two months the would take serious efforts to get its appeal decided and Commissioner, Ghotki would decide the Respondent No 2 ie, Deputy adjourning it 0n any excuse Nevertheless the without not decided on any of the grounds within the same of this arrangement would be subject to payment then continuation by the petitioner with tne Deputy of entire liability amount authority In any case
